summary: Formulas updated to calculate inventory metrics
evidence: Three formulas were modified: =IF(G5,SUM(G$3:G5)/5,"") was replaced with =IF(AND(G3<>"",ISBLANK($I3)),SUMIF($G$3:$G3)/5,"") and two additional formulas were added to calculate metrics for specific ranges.

summary: Updated list of inventory requests available at https://intel.sharepoint.com/sites/JF5SupportServices/JF/JF5/SupportServices/Lists/Inventory%20Requests/AllItems.aspx in the 'DCG Inventory Alpha' list
evidence: The updated list can be found in the 'DCG Inventory Alpha' list located at https://intel.sharepoint.com/sites/JF5SupportServices/JF/JF5/SupportServices/Lists/Inventory%20Requests/AllItems.aspx.
